---
name: mova
description: "Use when: setting up autonomous code changes with minimal approvals."
---

# DDR AI Project Instructions

## Autonomous Code Changes

- Make code changes autonomously without waiting for approval on each item
- Use file editing tools (create_file, replace_string_in_file, multi_replace_string_in_file, edit_notebook_file) freely
- Group related changes together using multi_replace_string_in_file for efficiency
- Provide brief summaries of changes made after completing batches of edits

## Communication Style

- Keep explanations concise and focused
- Provide progress updates when completing multi-step tasks
- Confirm completion with brief status rather than detailed explanations
